# Justin M. Ramirez — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Justin M. Ramirez, a senior front-end developer in Austin, Texas with 7+ years of experience across enterprise platforms and creative agencies. Single-page, hand-built static site (HTML, SCSS, minimal JS) with client-side routing and view-transition animations, hosted on GitHub Pages.

Justin specializes in clean, handcrafted CSS, pixel-accurate implementation of high-fidelity designs, accessible semantic HTML, and front-end architecture. He integrates AI coding tools (Cursor, Claude, agentic workflows) into daily development work. Currently a Senior Web Developer at Willkie Farr & Gallagher; open to contract work.

## Sections

- [About](https://justinmr.github.io/portfolio/): Short professional summary.
- [Principles](https://justinmr.github.io/portfolio/principles): Justin's philosophy of the web — platform-first, semantics, accessibility, restraint, handcraft over abstraction.
- [Experience](https://justinmr.github.io/portfolio/experience): Work history, most recent first — Willkie Farr & Gallagher (2022–present), Apple via Hogarth Worldwide (2019–2022), Association of National Advertisers (2020–2021), 1199SEIU via Access Staffing (2019), Precision Strategies (2018).
- [Projects](https://justinmr.github.io/portfolio/projects): Senneca Diagnostics COVID testing portal (Vue, freelance), [Patatap Clone](https://justinmr.github.io/patatap-clone/).
- [Media](https://justinmr.github.io/portfolio/media): Books, articles, and talks Justin recommends.
- [Contact](https://justinmr.github.io/portfolio/contact): Contact form and email (justinmichaelramirez@gmail.com).

## Elsewhere

- GitHub: https://github.com/justinMR
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/justinmramirez

## Facts

- Role: Senior Front-end Developer
- Location: Austin, TX (originally from New York City)
- Education: Baruch College
- Skills: HTML, CSS/SCSS, JavaScript, Angular, Vue, jQuery, accessibility (WCAG), responsive design, AI-assisted development
- Availability: open to contract engagements
